message:
feat(codegen): implement index maintenance for INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE (bd-so1h, bd-34se, bd-2f9t)

- Add emit_index_inserts() helper to emit IdxInsert opcodes for all indexes
- Add emit_index_deletes() helper to emit IdxDelete opcodes for all indexes
- Update codegen_insert to open/close index cursors and call emit_index_inserts
- Update codegen_delete to open/close index cursors and call emit_index_deletes
- Update codegen_update to open/close index cursors and call both helpers
- All 72 codegen tests pass

Phase 5I index maintenance: now INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE properly
maintain B-tree index entries alongside table modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
